ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Code or SKU of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in grams */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the product in centimeters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the product in centimeters */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the product in centimeters */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing tier */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the tier applies to */,
  "quantity_range" TEXT /* Range of quantities for the tier (e.g., 1-2, 3-10) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for the specified quantity range */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied for the specified quantity range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_tiers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse the inventory is stored in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_pricing_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing tier */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variant the tier applies to */,
  "quantity_range" TEXT /* Range of quantities for the tier (e.g., 1-2, 3-10) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for the specified quantity range */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied for the specified quantity range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_pricing_tiers_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)
